emails.subject: Transport Model
emails.body: Transport Model Colleen and Greg, I talked to Zimin today and he agreed with me on the change to the model. There are basically 3 columns in the model that need to be changed. Let me know when you want to get together to make the change and run parallel. Thanks. John

emails.subject: Re: Transport Model
emails.body: Re: Transport Model John--Sorry for the delay in getting back to you. I am available to meet Wed or Thurs (20th or 21st)--why don't you see if Greg is available any time before 1:00 either of those two days? I will be on vacation this Friday and all of next week. (That is if you two haven't already met about this). John Griffith@ENRON 12/13/2000 03:02 PM
